data.title: Edimakor launches V4.2.0 with Google Veo 3, enhancing AI video creation. Trusted platform for global creators.
data.description: Edimakor, a leading AI-driven video editing platform for global creators, has recently rolled out Version 4.2.0, marking a significant advancement in immersive content development. The latest update incorporates Google Veo 3, offering users access to cutting-edge features for enhanced video editing capabilities.

data.title: New tariffs by President Trump may raise prices for popular restaurant items like coffee and burgers, impacting food costs nationwide.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, President Donald J. Trump unveiled a series of new tariffs that may have significant effects on consumer prices. These tariffs are expected to directly impact the cost of food and beverages, potentially leading to higher prices for commonly consumed items such as coffee and hamburgers. The implementation of these tariffs could result in an increase in prices across various sectors, impacting the budgets of households and businesses alike.

data.title: Ameresco (NYSE: AMRC) to report EPS of $0.07 on 2025-08-04. Shares trading at $16.92, down 40.82% in 52 weeks. Analysts anticipate 14.66% potential upside with a consensus rating of Buy. Last quarter, company beat EPS by $0.14 resulting in 11.78% increase in share price.
data.description: Ameresco is set to report its quarterly earnings on August 4, 2025, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.07. The company has a history of surpassing estimates, with a notable 11.78% increase in share price after beating EPS by $0.14 last quarter. However, over the past year, Ameresco's shares have declined by 40.82%, leading to concerns among long-term shareholders. Analysts have a Buy rating on Ameresco, with an average one-year price target of $19.4, suggesting a potential 14.66% upside. Overall, investors are eagerly awaiting the earnings report for news on surpassing estimates and favorable guidance for the next quarter.

data.title: Mandalay Resources Corporation announces acquisition by Alkane Resources Limited: shareholders to receive 7.875 Alkane shares per Mandalay share.
data.description: In an announcement on August 1, 2025, Mandalay Resources Corporation revealed that the Supreme Court of British Columbia has granted final approval for a plan of arrangement where Alkane Resources Limited will purchase all outstanding common shares of Mandalay. This deal, under the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia), will provide Mandalay shareholders with 7.875 fully paid ordinary shares of Alkane for each Mandalay Share they own. Mandalay Resources Corporation is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: MND) and OTCQB Market (OTCQB: MNDJF).

data.title: Ace Hardware and Ace Handyman Services awarded as top franchises on 2025 list by Entrepreneur magazine.
data.description: Ace Hardware, a renowned hardware cooperative based in Oak Brook, Illinois, has been acknowledged by Entrepreneur magazine as one of the top franchise opportunities globally. This recognition was included in the prestigious "Best of the Best" list issued by the magazine on August 1, 2025. Ace Hardware is celebrated as the largest hardware cooperative worldwide, emphasizing its prominent position in the industry.

data.title: Playback available for webinar on construction risk hosted by AM Best.Industry faces challenges including rising costs and labor shortages.
data.description: In Oldwick, N.J., a recent complimentary webinar titled “Navigating Construction Risk: Evolving Exposures, Strategic Solutions,” sponsored by Munich Re Specialty and hosted by AM Best, is now offering video playback. The construction industry encounters a challenging risk environment influenced by increasing costs, labor scarcities, complex projects, and changes in the legal landscape. The webinar features a panel of insurance professionals from broking and underwriting sectors discussing these industry challenges. Construction companies are urged to watch the video for insights on tackling these evolving risks.

A powerful mudflow surged from Russia’s Mount Elbrus, flooding Tyrnyauz, halting water and gas, and damaging homes, highways, and the town’s lifeline bridge. Locals and tourists evacuated as the region reels from this natural shock.

data.title: Darrin Anderson appointed CEO of KENDELL, a commercial door solutions provider in Minneapolis - 25 years of experience.
data.description: In a news release from Minneapolis on August 1, 2025, KENDELL, a prominent supplier of commercial door, frame, and hardware solutions, revealed the appointment of Darrin Anderson as their new Chief Executive Officer. With this development, Anderson, who boasts more than 25 years of leadership expertise, assumes the role with immediate effect.
